Query: Where can I get trichoderma and Beauveria?

Query: Why are my bottle gourd vines wilting and drying?

Query: How do I control pests in my rice crop?

Query: What fertilizers should I apply before sowing rice?
KCC Ans: Before sowing rice, apply 60 kg nitrogen, 60 kg phosphorus, and 60 kg potassium per hectare for hybrids. Apply half the nitrogen 35 days after sowing.

Query: How do I control shoot borers in my brinjal?

Query: How much manure should I apply to aonla trees?

Query: Can I plant Ashoka trees?
KCC Ans: Yes, you can plant Ashoka trees in well-drained soil with 10 kg FYM per pit. They're ornamental and low-maintenance.

Query: Can I grow chickpeas in the kharif season?
KCC Ans: Chickpeas are a rabi crop and not suitable for kharif. Grow kharif crops like rice or maize instead.

Query: How do I dry a peepal tree?
KCC Ans: Drying a peepal tree is not recommended, but if needed, apply Mira-71 at 100 g per liter of water cautiously. Consult an expert due to environmental concerns.

Query: Why are my tomato plants and fruits drying up?
KCC Ans: Drying tomato plants and fruits may be fungal. Spray dithane M-45 at 2 g per liter of water every 7-10 days, and ensure proper irrigation.

Query: How much NPK 19:19:19 should I spray on rice per acre?
KCC Ans: Spray NPK 19:19:19 at 1 kg per acre in 200 liters of water as a foliar feed for rice to address nutrient deficiencies.

Query: How do I control green pests on my tomato leaves?
KCC Ans: To control green pests on tomato leaves, spray profenofos at 1 ml per liter of water every 7-10 days, not 15-20 ml. Target affected areas.

Query: When should I sow kidney beans?
KCC Ans: Sow kidney beans in the first week of October for the best growth and yield in most regions.

Query: What's the ideal spacing for pomegranate plants?
KCC Ans: For pomegranate plants, maintain a spacing of 3-5 meters between plants to ensure healthy growth and fruiting.

Query: How can I improve soil fertility?
KCC Ans: To improve soil fertility, apply farmyard manure, compost, or neem cake to the soil. Rotate crops and test soil regularly.

Query: Why are pests leaving sticky residue and black mold on my mango leaves?
KCC Ans: Sticky residue and black mold on mango leaves indicate sooty mold from pest secretions. Spray methyl parathion 50 EC at 1 ml per liter of water every 7-10 days, not 10 ml.

Query: How do I start a poultry farm?

Query: How do I grow aloe vera?
KCC Ans: For aloe vera, plant suckers in March-April in well-drained soil. Apply 10 tons FYM per hectare and irrigate every 15-20 days. Contact your KVK for details.

Query: When should I apply urea to maize?
KCC Ans: Apply urea to maize 20-25 days after sowing, after irrigation, at 120 kg per hectare, split into two doses.

Query: How should I manage mint harvesting?
KCC Ans: For mint harvesting, you can cut the crop 2-3 times a year, every 100-120 days. Harvest the first crop in May-June before the monsoon, the second in September-October after the monsoon, and the third in November-December. Cut above the first node to encourage regrowth.

Query: Is there a subsidy for spray machines?
KCC Ans: For subsidies on spray machines, contact your local block agricultural office or Krishi Vigyan Kendra (KVK). They can guide you on schemes like the Sub-Mission on Agricultural Mechanization, which offers up to 50% subsidy on equipment for eligible farmers.

Query: How much zinc should I apply to my rice crop?
KCC Ans: To correct zinc deficiency in rice, spray 2.5 kg zinc sulphate mixed with 1 kg slaked lime in 500 liters of water per hectare. Apply 15-20 days after transplanting for best results.

Query: Why are my moong leaves turning yellow, and what should I do?
KCC Ans: Yellowing moong leaves may indicate a nutrient deficiency or pest issue. Spray 2% urea (20 g per liter of water) to address nitrogen deficiency. If pests like aphids are present, use imidacloprid 17.8 SL at 0.5 ml per liter instead of dimethoate, which may be unsafe at 1000 ml/ha. Check soil nutrients and consult your KVK.

Query: Why isn't my pomegranate flowering, and why are the flowers dropping?
KCC Ans: To promote flowering in pomegranate, apply 500 g NPK (10:26:26), 100 g zinc sulphate, 10 g borax, and 20 kg farmyard manure per tree in August. Repeat in December. Spray Planofix at 0.5 ml per liter during flowering to reduce flower drop.

Query: How do I control weeds in my rice field?

Query: Why are my tomato plants rotting, and why are the flowers turning black?

Query: Why is my rice crop turning yellow with worms cutting the roots?

Query: How much NPK should I apply to my rice crop?

Query: Why are the roots of my bottle gourd, chili, bhindi, and bitter gourd being cut?
KCC Ans: For root-cutting pests in these crops, apply chlorpyrifos 20 EC at 3 ml per liter of water near the roots of each plant. Irrigate lightly and wear protective gear.

Query: How do I control pests in my bottle gourd crop?
KCC Ans: For pests in bottle gourd, spray quinalphos 25 EC at 2 ml per liter of water every 7-10 days. Wear protective gear and target the undersides of leaves.

Query: Why aren't my chili plants producing flowers or fruits?
KCC Ans: For chili plants not producing flowers or fruits, spray Planofix at 0.5 ml per liter of water every 10-14 days. Ensure proper pollination and nutrient supply.

Query: Why isn't my rice crop growing well?
KCC Ans: For poor rice growth, test your soil for nutrient deficiencies. Apply 20 kg nitrogen and 10 kg zinc sulphate per hectare and irrigate immediately.

Query: Why are my potato leaves turning yellow?
KCC Ans: For yellowing potato leaves, spray a micronutrient solution at 1 ml per liter of water every 10-14 days. Ensure balanced fertilization and proper irrigation.

Query: What's the information on soil types?
KCC Ans: Soil types include sandy, clay, loamy, and saline soils, each with specific properties. Contact your Krishi Vigyan Kendra for a soil test and detailed guidance.

Query: Which rice varieties are best for direct seeding?
KCC Ans: For direct seeding, rice varieties like Govind, Narendra-118, and Narendra-97 are high-yielding and adaptable.

Query: What should I do if my dog has diarrhea?
KCC Ans: For diarrhea in your dog, give a solution of ajwain mixed with water. Consult a veterinarian immediately for a proper diagnosis and treatment.

Query: Which rice varieties are suitable for direct seeding?
KCC Ans: For direct seeding, use rice varieties like Govind, Narendra-118, and Narendra-97 for high yields and adaptability.

Query: Why are brown spots appearing on my chili crop?
KCC Ans: For brown spots on chili, spray mancozeb 75 WP at 2 grams per liter of water every 7-10 days. Remove affected leaves and improve air circulation.

Query: How far apart should I plant papaya plants?
KCC Ans: Plant papaya plants 1 meter apart to ensure healthy growth and good fruit production.

Query: How far apart should I plant tomato plants?
KCC Ans: Plant tomato plants 20 cm apart from plant to plant in rows 30-35 cm apart for optimal growth.

Query: Why are my pomegranate flowers drying and not fruiting?
KCC Ans: For drying pomegranate flowers, spray Planofix at 0.5 ml per liter of water every 10-14 days. Ensure proper irrigation and pollination.

Query: Why isn't my buffalo giving milk?
KCC Ans: For low milk production, feed your buffalo a balanced diet with green fodder, 50 grams of mineral mixture, and 1 kg concentrate daily. Consult a veterinarian for health checks.

Query: How do I control pests in my maize crop?
KCC Ans: For pests in maize, spray quinalphos 25 EC at 2 ml per liter of water every 7-10 days. Wear protective gear and consider neem oil.
